source: 用户提供的 Chrome 应用商店“艺术与设计”分类页面文本
page_type: Chrome 应用商店 / 扩展程序 / 艺术与设计

extensions.name: Image Downloader
extensions.description: Browse and download images on the web

extensions.name: Adobe Photoshop
extensions.description: 轻松移除背景、调整颜色等。此外，还可免费使用 Photoshop 网页版 6 个月。

extensions.name: Sumopaint - Online Image Editor
extensions.description: Sumopaint is a full featured painting and image editing application.

extensions.name: OceanHero: Save Our Oceans by Surfing the Web
extensions.description: Join the movement to fight ocean plastic. Your searches help support real cleanup efforts.

extensions.name: Muzli - Design inspiration hub
extensions.description: Your daily dose of design with industry news, tools, and inspiration - all in one place.

extensions.name: Image Downloader - Save pictures
extensions.description: Find, choose and download images you need from any web pages or select all to bulk image download at once.

extensions.name: Download All Images
extensions.description: Easily save images with a wide range of customization features, such as file size, dimensions, and image type.

extensions.name: Custom Calendar Background
extensions.description: Adds background images to Google Calendar

extensions.name: Save to Cosmos
extensions.description: Saving extension for Chrome

extensions.name: Tabliss - A Beautiful New Tab
extensions.description: A beautiful New Tab page with many customisable backgrounds and widgets that does not require any permissions.

extensions.name: EXIF Viewer Classic
extensions.description: Quickly access EXIF data of your photos

extensions.name: Bulk Image Downloader
extensions.description: Bulk download images from multiple tabs in one click. Supports AVIF, WebP & AI-generated images. Filter by resolution and file type.

extensions.description: 一键下载图片。功能强大的下载器，支持原始尺寸保存、批量下载与自动滚动抓取。

extensions.name: Button Stealer
